name: Thermal Insulation Calculator

result_context: To {area_m2} m² of area need {plancha_m2} m² of planchas of insulation (with 5% of waste), equivalentes a {vol_m3} m³ of material.
formula_display: Area = largo × high; Planchas = area × 1.05; volume = area × espesor_m
